Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. SHARON ROSSI, Esq. of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell (tel:415-956-2828) for Plaintiff.
Atty. RICHARD LAMBERT, Esq. of Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP (tel: 510-463-8600) for Defendants.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.
